heroHeadline: Day 43: Israel Rejects Hezbollah Ceasefire as Lebanon Talks Loom; US Negotiators in Islamabad
heroSubtitle: Israel has rejected a ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks scheduled for next week, insisting the Lebanon front is a separate theater from the US-Iran diplomatic track. US negotiators remain in Islamabad pressing forward with Iran ceasefire talks as Israel's overnight strike on a Lebanese government building and Hezbollah rocket fire on an ancient church underscore the Lebanon front's volatility.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-11. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent.
